sections.heading: Content
sections.content:
Log mn = Log m + Log n
Log (m/n) = Log m – Log n
Log mp = pLog m
Log 1 = 0
Logmm = 1
Log (1/m)n= Log m-n = -nLog m

sections.heading: Change of base
sections.content:
Log mn = Logan
Logam
Examples:
Express as logarithm of a single number 2Log3 + Log6 solution:
2log3 + log 6
= log32+ log 6 = log 9 + log 6
= Log 9 x6 = Log 54
Simplify Log 8 ÷ Log 4 Solution:
Log 8 ÷ log 4 = log 23 = 3log2 = 3/2
log 22 2log2
Evaluate 3log2 + log 20 – log 1.6 Solution
= log23 + log 20 – log(16/10)
= log 8 + log 20 – log (8/5)
= log (8 x 20÷ 8/5)
= log (8 x 20 x 5 ÷ 8)
= log 100 = log102 = 2log 10 = 2

sections.heading: Evaluation:
sections.content:
Simplify the following: a. ½ log 25 b. 1 + log 3 c. log 8 + log 4
Evaluate log 45 – log 9 + log 20
Given that log 2 = 0.3010, log 3 = 0.4771 and log 7 = 0.8451, evaluate a. log 42 b. log 35 4. Solve 22x - 10 x 2x+ 16 = 0
